---
title: "Skills & Experience"
description: "Technical expertise, field skills, and professional experience in marine science and ecological data management"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-hero">
  <p class="hero-tagline">Bridging field science and data — from reef surveys to R scripts</p>
</div>
```

## Professional Experience

::: {.experience-card}
### Ecological Data Manager
**Mwambao Coastal Community Network** | Tanzania | *2019 – Present*

Leading ecological data management across a network of coastal monitoring sites spanning Tanzania's coastline. Responsible for designing monitoring protocols, managing field teams, building data pipelines, and producing reports for conservation decision-making.

**Key responsibilities:**
- Biodiversity monitoring programme design and coordination
- Spatial data management and GIS mapping (seagrass, mangrove, coral extent)
- Statistical analysis of long-term ecological trends in R
- Stakeholder reporting — government, NGO, and community audiences
- Community ranger training and capacity building
- Documentary and media engagement as field science expert
:::

::: {.experience-card}
### MSc Marine Science
**University / Institution** | *Year of Completion*

Graduate research focused on [coastal ecology / marine biodiversity / relevant thesis topic]. Developed rigorous scientific methodology in ecological field surveys, statistical analysis, and conservation planning.
:::

---

## Technical Skills

```{=html}
<div class="skills-section">

  <div class="skill-category">
    <h3>Programming & Data</h3>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">R (Data Analysis & Visualisation)</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="90"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">Python</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="65"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">SQL / Database Management</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="75"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">Excel / Spreadsheet Analysis</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="85"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skill-category">
    <h3>GIS & Spatial Analysis</h3>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">QGIS</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="85"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">ArcGIS</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="70"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">R Spatial (sf, terra, tmap)</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="80"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skill-category">
    <h3>Visualisation & Reporting</h3>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">ggplot2</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="90"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">R Shiny Dashboards</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="70"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">Plotly / Interactive Charts</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="72"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-bar-wrap">
      <div class="skill-label">Quarto / R Markdown</div>
      <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="85"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
function animateSkillBars() {
  const fills = document.querySelectorAll('.skill-fill');
  fills.forEach(fill => {
    const width = fill.getAttribute('data-width');
    fill.style.width = width + '%';
  });
}

const skillObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      animateSkillBars();
      skillObserver.disconnect();
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.2 });

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const section = document.querySelector('.skills-section');
  if (section) skillObserver.observe(section);
});
</script>
```

---

## Field & Scientific Skills

::: {.skills-tag-grid}

::: {.skill-tag-group}
**Marine Surveys**

[Reef Fish Counts]{.skill-tag} [Coral Health Assessment]{.skill-tag} [Benthic Surveys]{.skill-tag} [Seagrass Transects]{.skill-tag} [Mangrove Surveys]{.skill-tag} [Invertebrate Monitoring]{.skill-tag}
:::

::: {.skill-tag-group}
**Ecological Methods**

[Biodiversity Indices]{.skill-tag} [Species Distribution Modelling]{.skill-tag} [Time Series Analysis]{.skill-tag} [Statistical Modelling]{.skill-tag} [Ecological Baseline Studies]{.skill-tag}
:::

::: {.skill-tag-group}
**Conservation & Management**

[MPA Design Support]{.skill-tag} [LMMA Facilitation]{.skill-tag} [Conservation Planning]{.skill-tag} [Stakeholder Engagement]{.skill-tag} [Citizen Science Design]{.skill-tag} [Impact Assessment]{.skill-tag}
:::

::: {.skill-tag-group}
**Communication**

[Scientific Report Writing]{.skill-tag} [Data Storytelling]{.skill-tag} [Workshop Facilitation]{.skill-tag} [Documentary Consultation]{.skill-tag} [Community Training]{.skill-tag}
:::

:::

---

## Languages

::: {.language-row}
| Language | Proficiency |
|---|---|
| English | Professional / Fluent |
| Swahili | Native |
:::

---

## Download CV

```{=html}
<div class="cv-download-box">
  <p>Full curriculum vitae with complete education, publications, and work history.</p>
  <a href="documents_/Laurian_kaijage_general_CV.pdf" download class="cta-btn primary">⬇ Download CV (PDF)</a>
  <a href="cv.html" class="cta-btn secondary">View CV Online</a>
</div>
```
